visual_identity: telephone-signal-pop within dreamy atmospheric anime with luminous space palette
song_motif: a forced smile reflected as a split ambient expression

color_palette.base: deep indigo and midnight space backgrounds
color_palette.shadow_color: dark sapphire and deep indigo shadow
color_palette.secondary_light: subtle soft rose shimmer secondary glow
color_palette.highlight: cool pearl and icy white highlights
color_palette.rule: limited-color anime palette: electric blue dominant, dark shadows, near-black backgrounds, subtle soft rose shimmer secondary glow, cool pearl and icy white highlights

base_palette: deep indigo and midnight space backgrounds
core_locations: quiet observatory-like room with rotating optical elements
modular light chamber with movable translucent planes
open black-box performance space defined by projected grids
analog control room with patch cables, meters, and geometric shadows
kinetic installation corridor responding to footsteps
minimal concert stage with ajaeng shimmer trails and pulse lights
empty phone booth glowing under soft rain haze
open night bridge with waveform reflections on wet pavement
quiet rooftop with warm signal lines crossing the night sky
street corner below old telephone wires and soft amber light
recurring_symbols: a forced smile reflected as a split ambient expression
thin ajaeng-string bracelet shimmering on chorus pulses
lighting_language: measured electric blue pulses with subtle secondary light response, line-click light flickers, soft waveform trails, amber-blue night haze, light defines depth, rhythm, and interface state rather than decorating the scene, dark sapphire and deep indigo shadow, cool pearl and icy white highlights
transition_language: smooth rhythmic match cuts and gentle push transitions through a forced smile reflected as a split ambient expression, soft rose shimmer reflections, distant signal bloom, delicate string resonance, quiet hopeful motion, long continuous build interrupted by one deliberate structural cut

genre_reference.design_basis: Time-based abstraction, light as a structural element, systems, interfaces, repetition, variation, and human-machine tension.
genre_reference.narrative_direction: introduce a simple visual rule, vary it, break it, then resolve it in a transformed system
genre_reference.character_direction: clean modular silhouette with one tactile imperfection or analog detail
camera_language: precise symmetrical frame that slowly reveals one controlled deviation
measured orbit around layered translucent structures
macro interface detail expanding into architectural scale
locked geometric frame with motion occurring inside the composition
motion_language: loops evolve through phase shifts, parameter changes, and spatial layering
light, particles, panels, and reflections respond to musical structure
human motion remains simple so system behavior stays legible
genre_reference.safety: Use broad genre grammar only; do not imitate a recognizable artist, character, costume, prop, logo, video, or stage.
